tool.name: jira_update_issue
tool.description: Update fields of an existing Jira issue. Can update summary, description, assignee, priority, and labels.

parameters.name: summary
parameters.description: New summary/title (leave empty to keep current)

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: New description (leave empty to keep current)

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: New priority: 'Highest', 'High', 'Medium', 'Low', 'Lowest' (leave empty to keep current)
